title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at S.Chand Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!
